The story of the human race is the story of men and women selling themselves
short, settling for far less than they are truly capable of.
The truth is we’re all meant to thrive. We’re meant for success. We came into this
world with more talents and abilities than most of us ever use.
Our potential is only drawn from us when we are focused on our strengths, and
embrace who we really are.
As you grow you realize most people are oblivious to the turmoil in our society and
their lack of freedom.
There is nothing worse than living a life somebody else designed for you.
The system is designed so the majority fail, which is exactly what they are doing.
Enough is enough.
And I know that hits home with a TON of people.
Mostly because, it feels as if there are limited options for people, and that’s keeping
you from reaching your full potential…
Most people are taught to go to school…
Get a job…
Save your money…
Be frugal…
Invest in a 401(k)...
And retire at 65 years old.
Perhaps the only other common story we’re told is to go out and start your own
business from scratch.
Few, if anyone, is ever told that they can acquire an existing business… let alone are
shown how… and just a fraction of those people believe they're capable.
Business Acquisition Success is Your Duty
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 4 --

Because, here’s the thing, we all have been conditioned to make excuses for
ourselves that don’t really exist.
Here’s a few things we often say to ourselves…
I don’t have the time… I don’t have enough money… I don’t know the right people…
I’m not connected… I’m too young… I’m too old…
There’s always an excuse you can come up with.
And truly it’s not your fault, it’s been conditioned throughout your life and
experiences…
But it’s holding you back from success, and you need to step up and realize that.
So you can start heading on your path to freedom through business acquisitions.
Because like Grant always says… “success is your duty, obligation and your
responsibility.”
This is a major part of why Grant and I have created this blueprint for you.
To get you started on your 10X Acquisition Owner right now.
Grant often repeats his pledge about success being your duty.
And before you continue…
I want you to print this pledge…
Sign it…
Take a selfie holding it and tag me on instagram @brandonmdawsom of you
holding it up.
This is to announce to me and yourself that you’re going to take these next 28 days
seriously and get after your first successful acquisition…
Here’s the pledge…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

10X Business Acquisition Success is YOUR Duty
I, _________________, pledge total commitment and responsibility to my success in
learning and executing on the acquisition of cash-flowing businesses. I promise to do so
for my family’s success and the successful growth of the business I acquire.
Responsibility for my success in this course… and in executing what I learn in the real
world… is not an option for me but something I insist upon and am intentional about
achieving.
Success is not something the government, Grant, Brandon, the economy or anyone else
can provide me.
My success is not determined by outside forces, by luck or chance, my race, creed, color or
religion but is dependent upon how able I am to respond to my circumstances with hard
work, creativity, follow through, and persistence.
I refuse to allow anything to prevent my success.
I refuse to quit prior to achieving my success and I will do everything ethical in claiming
my right to my success no matter what.
My success is my duty, my obligation and my responsibility.
Signed,
